author: Haroen Viaene
subject: fix(insights): pass correct sendEvent to html template (#5457)
body:
* fix(insights): pass correct sendEvent to html template

There was an existing prop called `sendEvent`, which we passed through to the component when we introduced html templates. However, this sendEvent was actually sendEventToInsights, which is of course problematic, as it doesn't match the documentation, nor does it add the necessary conversion from a simple "three argument" form to "object form".

This PR changes the prop that existed from sendEventToInsights to sendEvent which comes from the connector.

discovered in https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch/discussions/5447#discussioncomment-4779169

* refactor: pass through same sendEvent

* nits :)
